issues.description: The new async taskkill fallback path is untested: the taskkill child's 'error' event wiring to the plain child.kill() fallback (gitScaffold.ts makeRefreshChildSpawner kill effects) had no unit coverage; the dispatchKill tests only cover synchronous throws. (Verifier returned no explicit severity; treated as blocking per the anti-laundering rule and recorded as Major.)
issues.verificationMethod: Inspect the kill/dispatch test coverage in copilotSeatSetup.test.ts / gitScaffoldSeatSetup.test.ts for a case that emits the taskkill child's error event and asserts the plain-kill fallback runs.
issues.resolution_notes: Extracted makeRealKillEffects(child, spawnFn) in gitScaffold.ts (exported, with a TaskkillSpawn seam); the spawner's kill() now calls dispatchKill(platform, pid, makeRealKillEffects(child)). New gitScaffoldSeatSetup.test.ts suite pins: taskkill argv + no plain kill on success; the ASYNC error event falling back to child.kill(); plainKill delegating to the child's own kill().

issues.description: describeSkipInstallIncompleteHonesty tests pinned only the positive half of the two-honest-states invariant: the keyless case lacked doesNotMatch(/api profile working/). (Verifier returned no explicit severity; the keyed negative half already existed. Fixed in the same pass regardless.)
issues.verificationMethod: Inspect the describeSkipInstallIncompleteHonesty suite for reciprocal negative assertions on both branches.
issues.resolution_notes: Keyless case now asserts doesNotMatch(/api profile working/); keyed case keeps doesNotMatch(/not functional/).
